mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BorrowRecord (user_id,book_id, borrow_date, return_date,admin_id) VALUES (#{userId},#{bookId}, #{borrow_date}, #{return_date} ,#{admin_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE BorrowRecord SET book_id = #{bookId}, user_id = #{userId}, borrow_date = #{borrowDate}, return_date = #{returnDate}, admin_id = #{adminId} WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM BorrowRecord WHERE record_id IN
#{id}
